description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house with a complex roofline featuring both gable and hip elements, as well as a small turret. The front facade is adorned with a covered porch supported by columns, and the entryway is accentuated by a decorative overhang. Multiple windows of varying shapes and sizes, including bay and circular windows, are symmetrically and asymmetrically arranged across the exterior. The property includes a fenced-in backyard area with a spacious patio and a rectangular swimming pool. Mature trees and landscaped shrubbery surround the house, adding to its suburban residential character.
description: A spacious two-story brick house with a covered front porch, decorative rooflines, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch with columns, and landscaped garden with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the turret, bay window, and partial view of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large patio, fenced swimming pool, and back facade with multiple windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid brick wall, turret, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical placement with bay and circular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent covered porch with columns, decorative overhang, and central front door
